data.title: Kelp DAO exploit hits DeFi - $293M loss spreads to 9 protocols. rsETH drops 23% amid concerns over lending risks.
data.description: A significant incident involving a hack related to kelp liquid restaking spread across various DeFi platforms including Aave, Compound, and 7 others. This led to a substantial 23% drop in the value of rsETH. The industry is currently engaged in discussions about the isolated risks associated with lending in the decentralized finance sector.

data.title: Bitcoin Hits $78,000 As 46 Days Of Short Positions Face Potential Short Squeeze
data.description: Bitcoin (BTC) has surged by 5% after surpassing the descending trendline that had been in place since the bear trend started from $128,000. This breakthrough has triggered short-squeeze conditions. The previous instance of this squeeze occurred in November to December 2022 during the FTX collapse. Analyst Vetle Lunde from K33 mentioned that traders had been actively establishing short positions and betting against a breakout, thus increasing the likelihood of a short squeeze if the upward momentum continues. In such a scenario, traders who had bet against the rally would face escalating losses, potentially leading to a rush to buy back positions all at once, resulting in a significant surge in prices due to the cascading short squeeze. The longer this situation persists, the greater the potential for a significant unwinding of positions. Additionally, banking giant Goldman Sachs (GS) made a notable move by filing for a Bitcoin ETF this week, marking its initial direct foray into the crypto space.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On ManpowerGroup After Q1 Results
data.description: ManpowerGroup (NYSE: MAN) announced strong first quarter earnings, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of 51 cents per share, exceeding the estimated 49 cents per share. Additionally, quarterly sales were reported at $4.510 billion, surpassing the expected $4.414 billion. Looking ahead, ManpowerGroup anticipates second-quarter GAAP EPS to range between 91 cents to $1.05, compared to market estimates of 96 cents. CEO Jonas Prising attributed the success to disciplined execution and improving demand trends, marking five consecutive quarters of revenue growth. This growth was supported by an expanded pipeline, sustained momentum in the Manpower brand, and operational efficiencies resulting from SG&A reductions. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Citizens Financial Analysts Raise Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
data.description: Citizens Financial Group (NYSE: CFG) announced strong first-quarter earnings, surpassing expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.13 per share, exceeding the estimated $1.09 per share. Quarterly sales reached $2.168 billion, higher than the anticipated $2.163 billion. Chairman and CEO Bruce Van Saun expressed satisfaction with the performance despite global uncertainties. The financial results showed impressive year-over-year EPS growth of 47%, operational leverage of 7%, NIM expansion of 7 bps sequentially and 24 bps compared to the previous year, and a solid balance sheet position. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On U.S. Bancorp After Q1 Results
data.description: U.S. Bancorp (NYSE: USB) released positive first-quarter 2026 results, exceeding expectations. The bank reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.18 in Q1, surpassing the estimated $1.14. Quarterly sales stood at $7.288 billion, above the expected $7.277 billion. CEO Gunjan Kedia attributed the positive 440 basis points of operating leverage to robust revenue growth, with ongoing investments and cost savings leading to a 260 basis points improvement in the efficiency ratio compared to the previous year. For the upcoming second quarter, U.S. Bancorp anticipates a 6%-7% growth in net interest income and fees. The bank also forecasts a full-year revenue increase of 4%-6% with over 200 basis points of operating leverage. Consequently, U.S. Bancorp shares saw a 3.4% rise in response to these results.

data.title: Lundbeck presents new data at AAN 2026 highlighting real-world changes in migraine-related cognitive symptoms after starting VYEPTI® (eptinezumab)
data.description: A recent study called INFUSE conducted in VALBY, Denmark, focused on analyzing patient-reported cognitive symptoms related to migraines. The study observed participants over one year, tracking any changes in symptoms over a six-month period. The participants included individuals who had experienced at least one previous treatment failure with anti-calcitonin gene-related peptide (anti-CGRP) medications. This research, conducted by H. Lundbeck, offers valuable insights into the cognitive aspects of migraines among patients, highlighting the importance of understanding and addressing such symptoms in clinical practice.

data.title: 8.2 BTC, over $600,000 tied to $9B Bitfinex hack in 2016, shifted by US government.
data.description: Recently, the U.S. government transferred 8.2 Bitcoin, valued at over $600,000, associated with the Bitfinex hack in 2016, which involved a staggering $9 billion.

data.title: Suntex Enterprises, Inc. (OTC: SNTX) Reports Annual Filing, Debt-Free Capital Structure, FINRA Dividend Submission, and Long-Term $100M Revenue Objective
data.description: Suntex Enterprises, Inc., based in Austin, Texas, disclosed on April 17, 2026, that they have submitted their yearly financial statements. The reports highlight the successful implementation of an operational reorganization and a streamlined capital framework. The company is listed on the OTC market under the ticker symbol SNTX.

data.title: Get Ready: Consumer Air Travel Is About To Change
data.description: The FAA and DOT have identified important collaborators for advanced air mobility tests, with the goal of furthering the development of air taxi services. This strategic partnership is crucial for the progression of the industry, providing support for companies involved. Stay prepared as consumer air travel is on the brink of significant transformation.

data.title: Tesla Earnings: What Robotaxi Updates Should Investors Expect?
data.description: In the upcoming earnings call, Tesla intends to broaden its robotaxi service to nine more cities by mid-year. The call will offer a crucial update on the company's developments in this arena. This move signifies an ambitious expansion plan for the automaker as it aims to enhance its presence in the autonomous vehicle market. Investors are keen on the updates regarding Tesla's robotaxi advancements, with anticipation for insights on the progress and potential impact on the company's financial performance.

data.title: QXO to Acquire TopBuild for $17 Billion
data.description: A deal has been struck between QXO, Inc. and TopBuild Corp., with QXO (NYSE: QXO) set to acquire TopBuild (NYSE: BLD) for around $17 billion. This move is anticipated to greatly enhance QXO's size and expertise within the building products market. The agreement is projected to have a quick and considerable positive impact on QXO's profits. TopBuild is noted as the primary distributor and fitter of insulation and associated building materials.

data.title: DeFi lending flaw exposed by Kelp exploit: Capital efficiency at risk for founders, says Curve Finance founder.
data.description: The founder of Curve Finance stated that while the contagion stemming from the Kelp exploit had the potential to be controlled, it would have come at the expense of capital efficiency. The founder suggested that containing the exploit would have required a larger allocation of resources, potentially impacting the effectiveness of capital usage within the platform.

data.title: Saramonic WiTalk9 X: Modular-Designed, Lightweight Wireless Intercom System Redefines Team Communication
data.description: On April 19, 2026, in New York, Saramonic, a top audio solutions brand, unveiled the WiTalk9 X, a 9-Person Modular Full-Duplex Wireless Intercom System along with the WiTalk9 Base. The latest WiTalk9 X model places emphasis on being lightweight and comfortable, building on the success of the WiTalk9. This system is designed to accommodate up to 9 individuals for seamless communication.

data.title: CFG surpasses important resistance at $0.26, up by 10.86% amid rising interest in asset tokenization. $0.35 target in play.
data.description: The price of CFG has increased by 10.86%, breaking through a key resistance level at $0.26, as the trend of tokenizing real-world assets gains interest from institutional investors. Analysts predict a potential 35% increase to $0.35 based on technical breakout patterns. However, there are concerns that the market may be overbought.

data.title: BLUR sees a $0.05 high before 40% drop to support, with RSI at 77.89. Targets $0.045-0.05 before $0.025 correction.
data.description: Following a notable 25% increase, BLUR has seen its Relative Strength Index (RSI) climb to 77.89. The negative funding rates suggest that sophisticated investors are anticipating a reversal in the market. The expected targets are set at a range between $0.045 to $0.05 before a correction down to $0.025.

data.title: ENA likely to surge by $0.15 with increasing whale accumulation. Institutional investment at $0.12 as breakout above $0.13 resistance looms.
data.description: Significant investments from institutional investors have been observed in ENA at the current price levels of $0.12, with a notable increase in funding. The technical analysis indicates a strong setup that is anticipated to lead to a potential breakout of around 25% above the critical resistance zone at $0.13. This surge in institutional money and the favorable technical indicators suggest a positive outlook for ENA in the near term.

data.title: USDE stablecoin stays at $1 peg with $18M daily volume despite no trading activity. Q2 could see 15-20% price swing due to peg mechanism stress test.
data.description: The US Dollar Exchange (USDE) is keeping its fixed exchange rate stable by actively minimizing volatility, with a daily trading volume of around $18 million. However, technical analysis indicates that there could be a significant price movement of 15-20% on the horizon as the mechanisms supporting the fixed rate will soon be tested by real-world pressures.

data.title: Top 10 publicly listed companies hold billions of dollars in Bitcoin, including Strategy, Twenty One, and Metaplanet.
data.description: Some of the largest publicly traded whales in Bitcoin, including Strategy, Twenty One, and Metaplanet, collectively hold billions in worth of the cryptocurrency.
Maisons du Monde delays release of 2025 annual results.

data.title: Opna Bio Announces Fast Track Designation Granted to OPN-6602 for the Treatment of Multiple Myeloma
data.description: In South San Francisco, Opna Bio, a biopharmaceutical company, revealed that the FDA has given Fast Track status to OPN-6602, a dual EP300/CBP inhibitor, for addressing multiple myeloma. This designation is for patients with relapsed/refractory MM after four prior lines of therapy. OPN-6602 aims to provide innovative oncology treatment.
